title: astragalus ensifer
intro: Astragalus ensifer, also known as the forked milkvetch, is a type of perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Astragalus ensifer is believed to have various health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing stress and fatigue. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, to support overall well-being and promote longevity.
